---
title: "fr_besgsdag_7"
subtitle: "`fr_besgsdag_7`"
description: "fr_besgsdag_7"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/fr_besgsdag_7/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                           |
|---------------------|------------------------------|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`             | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                    |
| `center`            | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                 |
| `sens_ready_wfv7`   | sens_ready_wfv7              | string | Zip bag with SENS activity tracker etc ready. Workflow. Visit 7.                      |
| `sens_sign_in_wfv7` | sens_sign_in_wfv7            | string | Indicates if the participant with is signed in in the SENS webapp. Workflow. Visit 7. |

: Fields in the `fr_besgsdag_7` resource.
